name: regression-openrouter-model-catalog
description: Verify /model OpenRouter catalog filtering surfaces provider model ids and tool support metadata.

steps.command:
"$PWD/.venv/bin/python" - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from kollabor.commands.system_commands.handlers.model import ModelCommandHandler
from kollabor_ai.providers import openrouter_model_info

class Profile:
    name = 'openrouter-auto'
    def get_provider(self): return 'openrouter'
    def get_model(self): return 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2'
    def get_supports_tools(self): return True

class ProfileManager:
    def get_active_profile(self): return Profile()
    def list_profiles(self): return [Profile()]

async def explode_if_called(self):
    raise AssertionError('plain /model must not fetch OpenRouter catalog')

openrouter_model_info.OpenRouterModelInfo.list_models = explode_if_called
handler = ModelCommandHandler(command_registry=None, event_bus=None, profile_manager=ProfileManager())
modal = asyncio.run(handler._get_models_modal_definition())
commands = modal['sections'][0]['commands']
print('title', modal['sections'][0]['title'])
print('footer', modal['footer'])
print('count', len(commands))
for command in commands:
    print('model', command['model_name'])
    print('description', command['description'])

class Command:
    args = ['list', 'all']

result = asyncio.run(handler.handle_model(Command()))
print('list_all_success', result.success)
print('list_all_message', result.message)
PY
steps.description: Plain OpenRouter /model uses curated shortlist and does not fetch full catalog
Plain modal is a recommended shortlist
Footer points users to search instead of dumping catalog
/model list all is blocked for OpenRouter

steps.pattern: OpenRouter has a very large model catalog
steps.description: List-all path explains why search is required

steps.command:
"$PWD/.venv/bin/python" - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from kollabor.commands.system_commands.handlers.model import ModelCommandHandler
from kollabor_ai.providers import openrouter_model_info

async def fake_models(self):
    return [
        {'id': 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2', 'name': 'DeepSeek V3.2', 'context_length': 163840, 'supported_parameters': ['tools', 'tool_choice']},
        {'id': 'openai/gpt-example', 'name': 'Other Model', 'context_length': 8192, 'supported_parameters': []},
    ]

openrouter_model_info.OpenRouterModelInfo.list_models = fake_models
handler = ModelCommandHandler(command_registry=None, event_bus=None)
commands = asyncio.run(handler._get_openrouter_model_commands(None, 'deepseek'))
for command in commands:
    print('model', command['model_name'])
    print('description', command['description'])
    print('supports_tools', command['supports_tools'])
print('count', len(commands))
PY
steps.description: Exercise OpenRouter catalog command builder with fake provider data
Filtered catalog includes DeepSeek model id
Description includes context length and tool support
